subcodes.title: Words spoken at a public park in San Francisco, 1912-10-05
subcodes.first_line: Although sensitivity in plants is slight as compared with that manifested in animals, within their own kingdom they have sensitivity and vegetable spirit.
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر چند نباتات نسبت بعالم حیوان حساس گفته نمی شوند ولی در عالم خود روح نباتی و قوهٴ حساسه دارند
subcodes.subjects: @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence
